title: MCP Tools for AI Todo Chatbot
description: Tool definitions for Model Context Protocol server exposing task management operations

tools.name: add_task
tools.description: Creates a new task for the authenticated user. Extracts task details from natural language and stores in database.

user_id.description: The authenticated user's ID (automatically provided by backend)

title.description: Task title extracted from user's message (1-200 characters)

description.description: Optional detailed description of the task (max 1000 characters)

priority.description: Task priority level: 'high', 'medium', or 'low'. Default is 'medium'.

due_date.description: Due date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Parsed from natural language expressions like 'tomorrow', 'next Monday', 'kal'.

success.description: Whether the task was created successfully

error.description: Error message if success is false

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: Retrieves tasks for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by completion status.

user_id.description: The authenticated user's ID (automatically provided by backend)

tasks.description: List of tasks matching the filter

error.description: Error message if success is false

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Marks a task as completed for the authenticated user.

user_id.description: The authenticated user's ID (automatically provided by backend)

task_id.description: The ID of the task to mark as completed

success.description: Whether the task was marked as completed

error.description: Error message if success is false (e.g., 'Task not found')

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Permanently deletes a task for the authenticated user.

user_id.description: The authenticated user's ID (automatically provided by backend)

task_id.description: The ID of the task to delete

success.description: Whether the task was deleted successfully

error.description: Error message if success is false (e.g., 'Task not found')

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Updates one or more fields of an existing task for the authenticated user.

user_id.description: The authenticated user's ID (automatically provided by backend)

task_id.description: The ID of the task to update

title.description: New task title (optional, only if updating title)

description.description: New task description (optional, only if updating description)

due_date.description: New due date in YYYY-MM-DD format (optional)

success.description: Whether the task was updated successfully

error.description: Error message if success is false (e.g., 'Task not found')

notes.authentication: All tools require authenticated user_id. Backend automatically injects user_id from JWT token.
notes.stateless: All tools are stateless. Each invocation creates a fresh database session.
notes.error_handling: Tools return success: false with error message instead of throwing exceptions.
notes.user_isolation: All operations are scoped to the authenticated user. Users cannot access other users' tasks.
notes.date_format: All dates use ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Natural language dates are parsed by AI service before calling tools.
